channel.title: GitHub Elixir Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Elixir in GitHub

item.title: plausible/analytics
item.description: Simple, open source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: blockscout/blockscout
item.description: Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

item.title: livebook-dev/livebook
item.description: Automate code & data workflows with interactive Elixir notebooks

item.title: kieraneglin/pinchflat
item.description: Your next YouTube media manager

item.title: elixir-lsp/elixir_sense
item.description: Provides context-aware information for code completion, documentation, go/jump to definition, signature info and more

item.title: elixir-lsp/elixir-ls
item.description: A frontend-independent IDE "smartness" server for Elixir. Implements the "Language Server Protocol" standard and provides debugger support via the "Debug Adapter Protocol"

item.title: elixirs/faker
item.description: Faker is a pure Elixir library for generating fake data.

item.title: teslamate-org/teslamate
item.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘

item.title: OpenFn/lightning
item.description: OpenFn/Lightning ⚡️ is the newest version of the OpenFn DPG and provides a web UI to visually manage complex workflow automation projects.

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix
item.description: Peace of mind from prototype to production

item.title: joken-elixir/joken_jwks
item.description: A Joken 2 hook for fetching the signer from a public JWKS url

item.title: bitwalker/libcluster
item.description: Automatic cluster formation/healing for Elixir applications

item.title: electric-sql/electric
item.description: Sync little subsets of your Postgres data into local apps and services.

item.title: ExHammer/hammer-backend-redis
item.description: A Redis backend for for the Hammer rate-limiter

item.title: BeaconCMS/beacon
item.description: Open-source content management system (CMS) built with Phoenix LiveView. Faster render times to boost SEO performance, even for the most content-heavy pages.

item.title: elixir-protobuf/protobuf
item.description: A pure Elixir implementation of Google Protobuf.

item.title: elixir-lang/elixir
item.description: Elixir is a dynamic, functional language for building scalable and maintainable applications

item.title: mtrudel/bandit
item.description: Bandit is a pure Elixir HTTP server for Plug & WebSock applications

item.title: elixir-ecto/ecto
item.description: A toolkit for data mapping and language integrated query.
